description: Mel Hair Braiding offers knotless braids, box braids, feed-ins, twists, loc care, and protective styling appointments in Charlotte, NC.

hero.copy: Clean parts, comfortable tension, and braid work designed to hold its shape while caring for your natural hair.

intro.heading: Styles that look polished on day one and still feel good in week four.
intro.copy: Whether you want a soft knotless set, defined feed-ins, boho length, or a careful refresh for locs — every appointment starts with a scalp and hair check so the style fits you.

services.name: Knotless Braids
services.description: Lightweight feed-in braids with a natural root and reduced scalp tension.

services.name: Box Braids
services.description: Classic protective styling with neat sections, secure ends, and optional beads.

services.name: Feed-In Cornrows
services.description: Sleek straight-backs, stitch parts, ponytails, and custom pattern work.

services.name: Boho Twists
services.description: Soft, movement-rich twists with curly accents for a fuller romantic finish.

services.name: Loc Care
services.description: Retwists, starter loc consults, detox care, and simple two-strand styling.

services.name: Consultation
services.description: Not sure what fits your hair, schedule, or budget? Start here.

videos.heading: See the process in motion
videos.copy: From first section to final look — real installs, real results.

galleryPreview.heading: Detailed parts, smooth finish, confident wear.

quote.text: My goal is simple: every client should leave with a style that feels secure, looks intentional, and does not punish their edges.
quote.author: Lead Stylist, Mel Hair Braiding

care.heading: A little prep keeps the install smooth.

tips.title: Come with clean hair
tips.tip: No heavy oils or gels — clean, detangled, and stretched gives the neatest finish.

tips.title: Protect at night
tips.tip: Sleep with satin and moisturize your scalp lightly between washes.

tips.title: Book timely touch-ups
tips.tip: Schedule removal or refresh before the style starts pulling or matting.

booking.heading: Tell us what you want in the chair.
booking.copy: Send your preferred style, date, and contact details. You'll receive confirmation with prep notes, timing, and deposit instructions.
booking.successMessage: Request received! We'll reach out within 24 hours.

footer.copy: Protective styling, braid care, and custom looks by appointment in Charlotte, NC.
